title: sunnypilot Settings UI Schema
description: Defines the structure of the sunnypilot settings UI panels, items, rules, and vehicle-specific settings.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor support.

schema_version.description: Version of the settings UI schema format.

panels.description: Top-level settings panels displayed in the UI.

vehicle_settings.description: Brand-keyed vehicle-specific settings. Each key is a car brand (e.g. 'hyundai', 'toyota').

Panel.description: A top-level settings panel (tab) in the UI.

label.description: Display label shown in the UI.

description.description: Optional description shown below the panel label.

remote_configurable.description: Whether this panel's settings can be changed remotely via sunnylink.

items.description: Settings items directly in this panel (no section grouping).

sub_panels.description: Nested sub-panels triggered by a setting.

PanelSection.description: A grouped section within a panel.

description.description: Optional description shown below the section title.

order.description: Sort order within the parent panel.

visibility.description: Rules that determine whether this section is visible. All rules must pass.

enablement.description: Rules that determine whether items in this section are enabled. All rules must pass.

attestation_required.description: When true, the UI must show an attestation modal before any write to items in this section.

title.description: Display title for this brand's settings group.

description.description: Optional description shown below the brand title.

SchemaItem.description: A single settings item (toggle, option selector, button group, etc.).

key.description: The param key this item reads/writes.

widget.description: The UI widget type to render.

title.description: Override display title (defaults to metadata lookup by key).

min.description: Minimum value for numeric option widgets.

max.description: Maximum value for numeric option widgets.

step.description: Step increment for numeric option widgets.

oneOf.description: Dynamic unit that changes based on IsMetric param.

metric.description: Unit label when IsMetric is true (e.g. 'km/h').

imperial.description: Unit label when IsMetric is false (e.g. 'mph').

unit.description: Unit label for numeric values. Use a string for static units or an object with metric/imperial variants for units that depend on the IsMetric param.

value_map.description: Maps stored values to display labels.

visibility.description: Rules that determine whether this item is visible. All rules must pass.

enablement.description: Rules that determine whether this item is enabled/interactive. All rules must pass.

sub_items.description: Child items nested under this item (e.g. options revealed by a toggle).

title_param_suffix.description: Renders an extra suffix in the item title chosen by the value of another param.

param.description: Param key whose value selects the suffix label.

values.description: Map from stringified param value to suffix label.

needs_onroad_cycle.description: When true, the device must cycle onroad/offroad for the new value to take effect.

blocked.description: When true, this item is treated as DEVICE_ONLY and the dashboard must not write it remotely.

requires_attestation.description: When true, writes to this item require an explicit per-write confirmation modal.

SubPanel.description: A nested panel that opens when triggered by a parent item.

label.description: Display label for the sub-panel header.

trigger_key.description: The param key that triggers opening this sub-panel.

trigger_condition.description: Optional rule that must evaluate to true for the sub-panel trigger to be active.

SchemaOption.description: A selectable option for option/multiple_button widgets.

value.description: The stored value when this option is selected.

label.description: The display label for this option.

enablement.description: Rules that determine whether this option is selectable. All rules must pass.

Rule.description: A visibility or enablement rule. Discriminated union on the 'type' field.

RuleOffroadOnly.description: Rule that passes only when the device is offroad.

RuleNotEngaged.description: Rule that passes when the vehicle is not engaged (matches Raylib `engaged = started AND (selfdriveState.enabled OR selfdriveStateSP.mads.enabled)`).

RuleCapability.description: Rule that checks a vehicle capability field against an expected value.

field.description: The capability field name to check.

equals.description: The expected value to match against.

RuleParam.description: Rule that checks a param value against an expected value.

equals.description: The expected value to match against.

RuleParamCompare.description: Rule that compares a numeric param value using a comparison operator.

value.description: The numeric value to compare against.

RuleNot.description: Rule that negates a single child condition.

RuleAny.description: Rule that passes if ANY of the child conditions pass (logical OR).

conditions.description: Child rules; at least one must pass.

RuleAll.description: Rule that passes only if ALL child conditions pass (logical AND).
